heroHeading: A place to grow, connect, and belong.
heroText: A structured, welcoming space for teens to connect and build positive habits.
featureItemOneText: Study hall opens and staff check-in begins.
featureItemTwoText: Game tournament sign-ups and group activities start.
sectionOneTitle: More than just a place to go after school.
sectionOneText: A supportive space with structure and flexibility for teens and families.
sectionTwoText: We provide a consistent, structured environment where teens can feel safe, supported, and connected.
sectionThreeText: Parents, staff, and teens all stay connected through clear communication and shared activities.
